contract_meta.phase_name: Workflow Phase 3 — Runtime Integration of PhaseState
contract_meta.enhancement: Connect the autonomous workflow state engine to the product runtime so developers and agents get a single, authoritative view of gates, tasks, and recommendations while a session executes.
contract_meta.rationale: Phases 1-2 delivered CLI tooling that synthesizes roadmap contracts into actionable workflow guidance, but the runtime and UI still operate on a separate, truncated progress model. This contract finishes the originally-scoped Phase 3 work by wiring the shared PhaseState module into server-side progress endpoints, eliminating drift, surfacing governance context to developers in real time, and unlocking Phase 4 autonomous execution.

project.name: Autonomous Workflow System
project.goal: Expose the workflow PhaseState (gates, contract tasks, suggested actions, human summary) through the Executor runtime so `/api/progress` and SSE consumers report the same guidance as `npm run state:show`, preventing decision drift before autonomous execution begins.
project.scope: Import shared PhaseState utilities into server runtime, enrich snapshot + SSE payloads with workflow metadata, add coverage to guarantee parity with CLI outputs, and document the integration for future phases.
project.estimated_time: 2-3 hours of TypeScript integration and validation
project.work_profile: TypeScript backend integration, SSE payload design, Vitest updates, documentation
out_of_scope: Frontend redesign beyond surfacing additional fields

execution_model.verification_strategy: Confirm Phases 1-2 tooling is healthy, then integrate PhaseState into runtime endpoints with incremental validation
execution_model.description: Reuse completed discovery artifacts for Phase 3 (shared PhaseState module scaffold). Verify workflow tooling health, wire shared state into server progress endpoints, enrich SSE snapshots, and validate parity via tests and manual inspection.

constraints: No new frontend frameworks (vanilla JS only)

observability.description: Track progress of wiring PhaseState into runtime endpoints and ensure parity with CLI workflow outputs.

tasks.title: Verify Phase 1-2 workflow tooling is healthy
tasks.description: Ensure snapshot and sync commands exist and pass before wiring them into the runtime.

evaluation.intent: Prevent integration work if foundational workflow tooling regressed
evaluation.success_criteria: All commands exit 0 and snapshot output contains suggested_next_action

tasks.title: Import PhaseState utilities into server runtime
tasks.description: Use loadPhaseState, suggestNextAction, and formatHumanSummary from src/state/phaseState.ts inside src/server.ts to generate workflow metadata for active sessions.

actions.description: Add imports from src/state/phaseState.ts and initialize workflow context alongside orchestrator snapshots.
Ensure workflow context is memoized per session to avoid redundant filesystem reads.

success_criteria: Server imports shared PhaseState utilities without circular dependency
Workflow context available inside progress snapshot builder
No lint or type errors introduced

tasks.title: Enrich progress snapshot and SSE payloads
tasks.description: Attach workflow metadata (current gate, pending tasks, suggested next action, human summary) to /api/progress, /api/progress/snapshot, and progress SSE responses.

actions.description: Extend snapshot builder to include phaseState.current, phaseState.tasks, and phaseState.suggestedNextAction fields.
Render new workflow fields in progress UI (e.g., tooltips or sidebar) without altering orchestration controls.
Add assertions that workflow metadata is present in API responses.

success_criteria: API and SSE payloads include workflow metadata
UI displays workflow summary without layout regressions

tasks.title: Parity test between CLI snapshot and runtime payload
tasks.description: Add regression tests ensuring runtime workflow data matches CLI PhaseState output for identical fixtures.

actions.description: Add fixture representing an in-progress session and assert parity with runtime serializer.

actions.content_spec: Shared fixture consumed by CLI and runtime tests.

success_criteria: Fixture-driven test compares CLI and runtime outputs
Coverage for new workflow fields is ≥ 80%
Parity test fails if runtime omits workflow metadata

tasks.title: Workflow Phase 3 validation gate
tasks.description: Confirm runtime workflow integration is stable and documented before starting autonomous execution work.

actions.description: Run npm run dev, initiate a sample session, and verify progress UI surfaces gate/task summary and suggested action in real time.

evaluation.intent: Ensure runtime + UI reflect workflow metadata with no regressions
evaluation.success_criteria: All automated validations pass and manual run confirms workflow summary display

win_isolation.description: Complete and validate each integration step before enriching payloads further.
win_isolation.implementation: Run lint and targeted tests after every win; halt on failure.

WF3-GATE.on_fail: Halt and remediate before beginning Workflow Phase 4.
WF3-GATE.report: Document failing validations and remediation plan in .automation/phase3_workflow_integration_evaluation.json

phase_specific_constraints.no_new_dependencies: Use existing stack only; raise ADR before adding libraries.
phase_specific_constraints.ui_scope_guard: Only augment existing progress UI. No new framework or layout overhaul.

fallback_policies.phase2_verification_fails: Stop immediately, restore Phase 1-2 tooling, rerun commands before continuing.
fallback_policies.runtime_integration_breaks: Revert server.ts changes, re-run tests, and reattempt with smaller increments.
fallback_policies.ui_regression_detected: Rollback UI tweaks and coordinate with UX owner before reapplying.
